name: Cyberdarkness Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>鎧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－サイバー・ダークネス・ドラゴン
name_jp_tl: Armored Hell Dragon - Cyber Darkness Dragon
desc:
5 "Cyberdark" Effect Monsters
Must first be Fusion Summoned. If this card is Special Summoned: You can equip 1 Dragon or Machine monster from your GY to this card. Gains ATK equal to the original ATK of the monster equipped to it by this effect. When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Equip Card you control to the GY; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
mnst_eff:
5 "Cyberdark" Effect Monsters
Must first be Fusion Summoned. If this card is Special Summoned: You can equip 1 Dragon or Machine monster from your GY to this card. Gains ATK equal to the original ATK of the monster equipped to it by this effect. When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Equip Card you control to the GY; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
eff:
5 "Cyberdark" Effect Monsters
Must first be Fusion Summoned. If this card is Special Summoned: You can equip 1 Dragon or Machine monster from your GY to this card. Gains ATK equal to the original ATK of the monster equipped to it by this effect. When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send 1 Equip Card you control to the GY; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card.

action: Equips monsters from the player's Graveyard to itself
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Requires nonspecific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
